name: Pasta Salad with Rocket and Tomato Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 oz (60 g) rocket leaves, chopped coarsely
Salt and freshly ground Black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatoes, garlic, and rocket leaves in a bowl. Add the olive oil and season well with the salt and pepper. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
2. Cook the pasta in plenty of lightly salted boiling water for 8 -10 minutes until al dente. Rinse well with cold water and drain thoroughly. Toss the pasta with the chilled tomato mixture and serve.
Cook's notes: Serve this salad warm - simply toss the hot, drained pasta into the chilled tomato sauce. If available, plum tomatoes taste delicious in this recipe.
Preparation and cooking time: 20 minutes + 2 hours chilling
Freezing not recommended You don't have to travel to Italy to enjoy wild rughetta, a spiky green-leaved plant with a strong peppery flavour. Most supermarkets now sell rocket, a slightly milder cultivated variety. If you can't find it, use spinach or a mixture of lamb's lettuce and watercress. Variation: Sprinkle each serving with 1/2 oz (15 g) grated Parmesan cheese.
